title: Fluffy Yoghurt Pancake
description: This earthy and fluffy whole30-friendly Fluffy Yoghurt Pancake is a light Australian dish that features melted butter for added richness.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine the Greek yogurt, eggs, melted butter, salt, and baking powder. Mix well until smooth.
Gradually add the milk to the mixture, stirring continuously to avoid lumps. Keep mixing until the batter is thick but pourable.
Once your skillet is hot, reduce heat to medium-low and grease lightly with a bit of olive oil.
Pour 1/4 cup of batter into the skillet for each pancake. Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Serve immediately with optional toppings such as fresh berries or a drizzle of honey.
